recent_projects.name: django-forge-ai
recent_projects.summary: A comprehensive AI toolbox for Django - seamless integration of LLM functionalities, RAG systems, and AI agents
recent_projects.author: DjangoForgeAI Contributors

recent_projects.name: wildfire-analyser
recent_projects.summary: Python library for post-fire assessment and wildfire analysis using Google Earth Engine.
recent_projects.author: Marcelo Camargo

recent_projects.name: CellProfiler-nightly
recent_projects.summary: CellProfiler is a free open-source software designed to enable biologists without training in computer vision or programming to quantitatively measure phenotypes from thousands of images automatically.
